description_long: This is a rectangular wooden toolbox with a simple, rustic design, featuring a single open compartment and a sturdy cylindrical handle running lengthwise across the top. The sides are solid and slightly angled, providing structural support and a classic silhouette. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the object a natural, unfinished appearance. The handle is integrated into the side panels, appearing as a solid dowel that is fixed and non-folding. There are no visible latches, locks, or external compartments, emphasizing a utilitarian and traditional construction. The interior is open and unobstructed, suitable for carrying hand tools or small items.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden toolbox with a single open compartment and a fixed cylindrical handle. The design is simple, sturdy, and utilitarian, with visible wood grain and no external latches or compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open compartment and the full width of the fixed cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid, angled side panel and the circular end of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the open compartment and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with the angled side panel and handle end.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed cylindrical wooden handle integrated into the side panels, round in shape, no ergonomic padding or folding features.
attribute_latch_mechanism: None visible; no latches or locking mechanisms present.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large open compartment with no visible trays, dividers, or external compartments; interior is unobstructed.
